tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# s5-s7, s13, s14に絞って表示
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s5', 's6', 's13', 's14']:
        print(f'=== {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]} ===')
        print(s['content'][:2000])
        print()
"

cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && python3 -c "
import json
with open('component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s5', 's6', 's13', 's14']:
        print(f'=== {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]} ===')
        print(s['content'][:2000])
        print()
"
